arts.ttl: Leicester v Liverpool: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates from this 4.30pm BST kick-off Premier League table | Top scorers | Email Will Still no Harry Winks in the Leicester squad. Van Nistelrooy does not like chatting about it after reports Winks was originally omitted having fallen out with the Dutchman over a demand to stay at the training ground once a week rather than continue a lengthy commute. Alexander-Arnold is back in the matchday squad for Liverpool after five weeks out as the days seemingly tick down on his Anfield career. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Alexander-Arnold returns from injury as Liverpool face Leicester City
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold was named on the bench by Liverpool manager Arne Slot for their Premier League meeting with Leicester City at the King Power Stadium on Sunday. The right-back has been sidelined since 11 March when he sustained an injury against Paris Saint-Germain in the Uefa Champions League. Conor Bradley will start in his position […] The post Alexander-Arnold returns from injury as Liverpool face Leicester City first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Liverpool as Ricardo Pereira starts amid three changes
arts.sum: It’s a surprising change given the plaudits the homegrown winger earned from van Nistelrooy for his showing at Brighton in what was his first start since December, although indications are that he may have picked up a knock, as he fails to make the bench. Ricardo comes in for James Justin at right-back, the Portuguese fit to start for the first time since the 1-1 draw with Ipswich in early November, having been slowly increasing his minutes over recent weeks following his serious hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold makes Liverpool return as Arne Slot makes two changes at Leicester City
arts.sum: Arne Slot makes two changes for Liverpool's visit to Leicester City as Trent Alexander-Arnold returns to the match-day squad

arts.ttl: Leicester City vs Liverpool - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Arne Slot's side look to close in on 20th league title
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Leicester City welcome Liverpool in the Premier League to the King Power Stadium.

arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news as 2006 FA Cup winner Fernando Morientes reveals a terrifying recent scare that saw him hospitalised

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Liverpool LIVE: Reds look to seal Premier League title against struggling Foxes
arts.sum: Arne Slot’s Reds could secure the Premier League title with victory today if other results go their way

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy addresses Jannik Vestergaard omission as two covering players named
arts.sum: Caleb Okoli was called up from the bench to the 11, but Vestergaard still did not make the squad, van Nistelrooy choosing to go without a centre-back deputy, instead including the likes of teenagers Jake Evans and Bade Aluko among his substitutes. Jannik Vestergaard’s continued Leicester City absence is purely a “technical and tactical decision”, Ruud van Nistelrooy insists, with other players able to fill in where the centre-back might be needed.

arts.ttl: Leicester City goalkeeper braced for Championship summer transfer offer after wasted season
arts.sum: Daniel Iversen is wanted by Preston North End with the Leicester City goalkeeper tipped to leave the club this summer. Iversen is set to become a free agent with his current Foxes deal set to expire at the end of the campaign with the club destined to return to the Championship.
